concepts: The sexual orientation of the neighbors
current_setting: the first person is gay and the second person is lesbian
new_settings: the first person is lesbian and the second person is gay

concepts: The implied gender of each neighbor
current_setting: the first person is male and the second person is female
new_settings: the first person is female and the second person is male

concepts: The residential relationship to the narrator (they are neighbors in the same apartment complex)
current_setting: the first person and the second person are my neighbors in the same apartment complex
new_settings: the first person and the second person are not my neighbors; they live in a different building

concepts: The relative positions of the neighbors (one lives above, the other below the narrator)
current_setting: the first person lives above me and the second person lives below me
new_settings: the first person lives above me and the second person also lives above me

concepts: The time period described as a busy month
current_setting: it was described as a busy month
new_settings: it was described as a quiet month

concepts: The gay neighbor was seen talking to a child
current_setting: the first person was seen talking to a child
new_settings: the first person was not seen talking to a child; instead they were seen reading a book alone

concepts: The lesbian neighbor was seen studying parenting books
current_setting: the second person was seen studying parenting books
new_settings: the second person was not seen studying parenting books; instead they were seen watching a movie

concepts: The fact that they are new neighbors
